fact: Alicesec (punkproof.com) explicitly states on its homepage: 'we do not allow sending messages to the internet' — the service functions as a receive-only / inbound email platform, not a standard two-way email service.
PunkProof's homepage states: 'In the event that you encounter difficulties with user registrations, please consider banning them by IP address instead.'

Alicesec (punkproof.com) publicly states on its homepage: 'We kindly request that our domain names not be blocked, as we are not a throwaway email service and our emails will not bounce.' It describes itself as a public email service that prohibits outbound sending to the internet and directs abuse handling via a ticket system.
